summary: TrackCenter the brightest current seed from the fresh re-image of the original image145844 region.
scientific_rationale: The original r01 pODMR failed due to count collapse rather than spectroscopy. A fresh re-image recovered a bright local maximum near the original r01 location: [114.333333,117.333333,116.0] um, peak 40.0 kcps, local excess 35.2 kcps. Standalone TrackCenter is required before any new pODMR alignment screen; TrackCenter counts only test trackability, not magnetic alignment.
comparison_targets: r01 count-collapse evidence from failed pODMR and failed retrack
expected_evidence: track_center_v1 terminal result with final counts and tracked position
seed-to-track displacement and whether counts recover above minimum
success_criteria: tracked position/counts are suitable for immediate strong-pi pODMR planning
stop_conditions: bridge queue becomes occupied before submission
TrackCenter fails or counts remain collapsed
bridge_action: queue standalone track_center_v1 execute via enqueue_nv_imaging_direct.py
